# Keymaps (auto-generated)

> Generated by `scripts/dump-keymaps.lua` from lazy plugin specs + the live keymap table.
> **Do not hand-edit.** Regenerate: `nvim --headless -l scripts/dump-keymaps.lua`.
> Only keymaps that carry a `desc` are listed. Live source of truth is which-key (`<leader>`).

## Normal mode

| Key | Description |
|---|---|
| `<leader> ` | Find Files (Root Dir) |
| `<leader>,` | Buffers |
| `<leader>-` | Split Window Below |
| `<leader>.` | Toggle Scratch Buffer |
| `<leader>/` | Grep (Root Dir) |
| `<leader>1` | Harpoon to File 1 |
| `<leader>2` | Harpoon to File 2 |
| `<leader>3` | Harpoon to File 3 |
| `<leader>4` | Harpoon to File 4 |
| `<leader>5` | Harpoon to File 5 |
| `<leader>6` | Harpoon to File 6 |
| `<leader>7` | Harpoon to File 7 |
| `<leader>8` | Harpoon to File 8 |
| `<leader>9` | Harpoon to File 9 |
| `<leader>:` | Command History |
| `<leader><Tab><Tab>` | New Tab |
| `<leader><Tab>[` | Previous Tab |
| `<leader><Tab>]` | Next Tab |
| `<leader><Tab>d` | Close Tab |
| `<leader><Tab>f` | First Tab |
| `<leader><Tab>l` | Last Tab |
| `<leader><Tab>o` | Close Other Tabs |
| `<leader>?` | Buffer Keymaps (which-key) |
| `<leader>E` | Explorer NeoTree (cwd) |
| `<leader>H` | Harpoon File |
| `<leader>K` | Keywordprg |
| `<leader>L` | LazyVim Changelog |
| `<leader>Pp` | Projects |
| `<leader>S` | Select Scratch Buffer |
| `<leader>`` | Switch to Other Buffer |
| `<leader>a` | +ai |
| `<leader>aC` | Continue Claude |
| `<leader>aE` | Claude: Explain file |
| `<leader>aF` | Claude: Fix file |
| `<leader>aR` | Claude: Refactor file |
| `<leader>aa` | Accept diff |
| `<leader>ab` | Add current buffer |
| `<leader>ac` | Toggle Claude |
| `<leader>ad` | Deny diff |
| `<leader>af` | Focus Claude |
| `<leader>ar` | Resume Claude |
| `<leader>bD` | Delete Buffer and Window |

| `<leader>xx` | Diagnostics (Trouble) |
| `H` | Prev Buffer |
| `L` | Next Buffer |
| `N` | Prev Search Result |
| `S` | Flash Treesitter |
| `[ ` | Add empty line above cursor |
| `[B` | Move buffer prev |
| `[D` | Jump to the first diagnostic in the current buffer |
| `[b` | Prev Buffer |
| `[d` | Prev Diagnostic |
| `[e` | Prev Error |
| `[q` | Previous Trouble/Quickfix Item |
| `[t` | Previous Failed Test |
| `[w` | Prev Warning |
| `] ` | Add empty line below cursor |
| `]B` | Move buffer next |
| `]D` | Jump to the last diagnostic in the current buffer |
| `]b` | Next Buffer |
| `]d` | Next Diagnostic |
| `]e` | Next Error |
| `]q` | Next Trouble/Quickfix Item |
| `]t` | Next Failed Test |
| `]w` | Next Warning |
| `gO` | vim.lsp.buf.document_symbol() |
| `g[` | Move to left "around" |
| `g]` | Move to right "around" |
| `gc` | Toggle comment |
| `gcO` | Add Comment Above |
| `gcc` | Toggle comment line |
| `gco` | Add Comment Below |
| `gl` | Diagnostic float (focused) |
| `gra` | vim.lsp.buf.code_action() |
| `gri` | vim.lsp.buf.implementation() |
| `grn` | vim.lsp.buf.rename() |
| `grr` | vim.lsp.buf.references() |
| `grt` | vim.lsp.buf.type_definition() |
| `grx` | vim.lsp.codelens.run() |
| `gx` | Opens filepath or URI under cursor with the system handler (file explorer, web browser, …) |
| `j` | Down |
| `k` | Up |
| `n` | Next Search Result |
| `s` | Flash |
| `zb` | Scroll cursor to bottom |
| `zt` | Scroll cursor to top |
| `zz` | Scroll cursor to center |

## Insert mode

| Key | Description |
|---|---|
| `"` | Closeopen action for '""' pair |
| `'` | Closeopen action for "''" pair |
| `(` | Open action for "()" pair |
| `)` | Close action for "()" pair |
| `<BS>` | MiniPairs <BS> |
| `<C-B>` | Scroll Backward |
| `<C-F>` | Scroll Forward |
| `<C-S>` | Save File |
| `<CR>` | MiniPairs <CR> |
| `<Esc>` | Escape and Clear hlsearch |
| `<M-j>` | Move Down |
| `<M-k>` | Move Up |
| `<S-Tab>` | vim.snippet.jump if active, otherwise <S-Tab> |
| `<Tab>` | vim.snippet.jump if active, otherwise <Tab> |
| `[` | Open action for "[]" pair |
| `]` | Close action for "[]" pair |
| ``` | Closeopen action for "``" pair |
| `{` | Open action for "{}" pair |
| `}` | Close action for "{}" pair |

| `<leader>sr` | Search and Replace |
| `<leader>sw` | Visual selection or word (Root Dir) |

| `<C-D>` | Scroll half-page down |

| `<C-u>` | Scroll half-page up |

| `<Esc>` | Escape and Clear hlsearch |
| `<M-j>` | Move Down |
| `<M-k>` | Move Up |
| `<S-Tab>` | vim.snippet.jump if active, otherwise <S-Tab> |
| `<Tab>` | vim.snippet.jump if active, otherwise <Tab> |
| `<Up>` | Up |

| `<leader>as` | Send to Claude |
| `<leader>gY` | Open git permalink |
| `<leader>gy` | Copy git permalink |

| `R` | Treesitter Search |
| `S` | Flash Treesitter |
| `[n` | Select previous node |
| `]n` | Select next node |
| `a` | Around textobject |
| `al` | Around last textobject |
| `an` | Around next textobject |
| `g[` | Move to left "around" |
| `g]` | Move to right "around" |
| `gc` | Toggle comment |
| `gra` | vim.lsp.buf.code_action() |
| `gx` | Opens filepath or URI under cursor with the system handler (file explorer, web browser, …) |

| `il` | Inside last textobject |
| `in` | Inside next textobject |

| `k` | Up |
| `n` | Next Search Result |
| `s` | Flash |

| `zz` | Scroll cursor to center |

## Terminal mode

| Key | Description |
|---|---|
| `<C-/>` | Terminal (Root Dir) |
| `<C-W>` | Window commands from terminal |
| `<C-_>` | which_key_ignore |
| `<Esc>` | Exit terminal mode |

## Command mode

| Key | Description |
|---|---|
| `"` | Closeopen action for '""' pair |
| `'` | Closeopen action for "''" pair |
| `(` | Open action for "()" pair |
| `)` | Close action for "()" pair |
| `<BS>` | MiniPairs <BS> |
| `<C-S>` | Toggle Flash Search |
| `<S-CR>` | Redirect Cmdline |
| `<S-Enter>` | Redirect Cmdline |
| `<c-s>` | Toggle Flash Search |
| `[` | Open action for "[]" pair |
| `]` | Close action for "[]" pair |
| ``` | Closeopen action for "``" pair |
| `{` | Open action for "{}" pair |
| `}` | Close action for "{}" pair |
